text: Sentence: Software engineering is intended to support professional software development, rather than individual programming Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).
Sentence: Software engineering is an engineering discipline that is concerned with all aspects of software production Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: the Iterative model focuses on building the system in repeated cycles, gradually improving it with each version, while the Incremental model develops the software in smaller functional parts, delivering usable features step by step Entity1: software (CONCEPT). Entity2: incremental model (METHOD).
